beats.full_text: If a replay loop at midnight is familiar, this overthinking pattern needs a better reset.

beats.full_text: Trying to outrun overthinking usually makes the loop more expensive. More checking, more explaining, less actual recovery.
beats.ssot_text: Trying to outrun overthinking usually makes the loop more expensive: more checking, more explaining, less actual recovery.

More checking, more
beats.speakable_text: Trying to outrun overthinking usually makes the loop more expensive. More checking, more explaining, less actual recovery.

beats.full_text: Overthinking often persists because your threat scanner treats uncertainty like danger and keeps proposing more scenarios. More pressure can register as more threat, even when the intention is improvement.
beats.ssot_text: Overthinking often persists because your threat scanner treats uncertainty like danger and keeps proposing more scenarios. More pressure can register as more threat, even when the intention is improvement.

beats.speakable_text: Overthinking often persists because your threat scanner treats uncertainty like danger and keeps proposing more scenarios. More pressure can register as more threat, even when the intention is improvement.

beats.full_text: Try this. Write one fact, one fear. And one next action you can take in ten minutes. Keep it small enough to finish before your brain starts negotiating.
beats.ssot_text: Try this: write one fact, one fear, and one next action you can take in ten minutes. Keep it small enough to finish before your brain starts negotiating.

beats.speakable_text: Try this. Write one fact, one fear. And one next action you can take in ten minutes. Keep it small enough to finish before your brain starts negotiating.

beats.full_text: Bookmark the pattern. Signal, reset, next action. Anxious thoughts are proposals, not instructions.
